subcodes.title: Words to a Baha'í from Holland, spoken on 1913-02-10
subcodes.first_line: [Napoleon] Bonaparte was a powerful person in this earthly dominion.  His conquests, however, were limited.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بناپارت در عالم ملک یکی از نفوس عظیمه بود ولی فتوحاتش محدود بود منتهی شد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
